C

canDraw() - Static method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Checks if manual drawing is allowed.
CheckBox - Class in microui.component
A CheckBox component that represents a binary state (checked or unchecked).
CheckBox() - Constructor for class microui.component.CheckBox
Constructs a default CheckBox in the unchecked state, centered on the screen.
CheckBox(boolean) - Constructor for class microui.component.CheckBox
Constructs a CheckBox with the specified checked state, centered on the screen.
CheckBox(float, float) - Constructor for class microui.component.CheckBox
Constructs a CheckBox at the specified position with default size.
CheckBox.CheckStyle - Enum Class in microui.component
Enumeration defining the visual styles for displaying a checked checkbox.
clear() - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Clears all text content.
clear() - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Clears all text content while maintaining at least one empty line.
clear() - Method in class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Clears all text content.
clear() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Clears all text content.
clear() - Static method in class microui.util.Metrics
Clears all collected metrics.
CLICK - Enum constant in enum class microui.event.EventType
Click event (EDGE).
Clipboard - Class in microui.util
Utility class for clipboard operations with support for both system and local buffers.
Clipboard() - Constructor for class microui.util.Clipboard
 
close() - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Closes the menu.
Color - Class in microui.core.style
Concrete implementation of AbstractColor representing a solid RGBA color.
Color() - Constructor for class microui.core.style.Color
Constructs a default medium gray color (128 luminance, full opacity).
Color(float) - Constructor for class microui.core.style.Color
Constructs a grayscale Color with specified luminance and full opacity.
Color(float, float) - Constructor for class microui.core.style.Color
Constructs a grayscale Color with specified luminance and alpha.
Color(float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.core.style.Color
Constructs a Color with specified RGB components and full opacity.
Color(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.core.style.Color
Constructs a Color with specified RGBA components.
Color(AbstractColor) - Constructor for class microui.core.style.Color
Constructs a Color by copying components from another AbstractColor.
ColumnLayout - Class in microui.layout
Layout manager that arranges child components in a vertical column.
ColumnLayout() - Constructor for class microui.layout.ColumnLayout
Constructs a ColumnLayout with vertical orientation enabled.
ColumnLayoutParams - Class in microui.layout
Layout parameters specifically for ColumnLayout, defining how components are positioned and sized within a vertical column arrangement.
ColumnLayoutParams(float) - Constructor for class microui.layout.ColumnLayoutParams
Constructs ColumnLayoutParams with specified weight and default left alignment.
ColumnLayoutParams(float, int) - Constructor for class microui.layout.ColumnLayoutParams
Constructs ColumnLayoutParams with specified weight and horizontal alignment.
Component - Class in microui.core.base
Abstract base class for all interactive UI components in the microui framework.
Component() - Constructor for class microui.core.base.Component
Constructs a Component at position (0,0) with zero dimensions.
Component(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.core.base.Component
Constructs a Component with specified position and dimensions.
constrain(float, float, float) - Static method in class microui.util.MathUtils
Constrains a value to a specified range.
Container - Class in microui.core.base
Container component for organizing and managing GUI components.
Container(LayoutManager) - Constructor for class microui.core.base.Container
Constructs a Container with specified layout manager using default dimensions (full context width and height).
Container(LayoutManager, float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.core.base.Container
Constructs a Container with specified layout manager and dimensions.
Container.Entry - Record Class in microui.core.base
Represents an entry in the container, pairing a ContentView with its layout parameters.
Container.Mode - Enum Class in microui.core.base
Container operation modes.
ContainerManager - Class in microui.core.base
Singleton manager for handling multiple Container instances and providing animation transitions between them.
ContainerManager.AnimatorMode - Enum Class in microui.core.base
Animation modes for container transitions.
ContainerManager.Render - Class in microui.core.base
Internal class for handling automatic rendering through Processing's draw cycle.
contentView() - Method in record class microui.core.base.Container.Entry
Returns the value of the contentView record component.
ContentView - Class in microui.core.base
Abstract base class for all GUI components that can be displayed and interacted with.
ContentView() - Constructor for class microui.core.base.ContentView
Constructs a ContentView at origin (0,0) with zero dimensions.
ContentView(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.core.base.ContentView
Constructs a ContentView with specified position and dimensions.
convert(float, float, float, float, float) - Static method in class microui.util.MathUtils
Converts a value from one range to another.
copyMarginFrom(ContentView) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Copies margin values from another ContentView.
copyPaddingFrom(ContentView) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Copies padding values from another ContentView.
cursorAtEndOfLine() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Checks if the cursor is at the end of the current line.
cursorAtEndOfLines() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Checks if the cursor is at the end of all lines (last row).
cursorAtEndOfText() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Checks if the cursor is at the end of the text (last row, end of last line).
cursorAtStartOfLine() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Checks if the cursor is at the start of the current line (column 0).
cursorAtStartOfLines() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Checks if the cursor is at the start of all lines (first row).
cursorAtStartOfText() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Checks if the cursor is at the start of the text (row 0, column 0).
